description: The mindful closing of shared time that honors what has been and blesses what will be. Farewell encompasses gratitude for connection, hope for reunion, the acknowledgment of impermanence, and the understanding that good partings nurture future meetings.
rationale: The word 'mia' combines bright 'mi' with open 'a', creating vowel hiatus only. This brightness-to-openness structure captures farewell as bright memory opening into future possibility.
